title: strophanthus hispidus
intro: Strophanthus hispidus is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include cardiotonic and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating heart conditions and promoting urine production. The health benefits of Strophanthus hispidus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce edema, and alleviate symptoms of congestive heart failure. Strophanthus hispidus is typically prepared as a tincture or an infusion, and it can also be combined with other herbs to create a decoction, which is then used to treat various health conditions.
